Rishabh Pant Replaces KL Rahul in India’s Predicted XI vs New Zealand

Jan 12, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Rishabh Pant Replaces KL Rahul in India’s Predicted XI vs New Zealand

Rishabh Pant has replaced KL Rahul in India’s predicted XI for the first ODI against New Zealand, as veteran Irfan Pathan shared his playing XI ahead of the three-match series starting January 11 in Vadodara. The inclusion of Pant signals a tactical shift, with the dynamic wicketkeeper-batter expected to provide stability in the middle order.

India will be keen to bounce back after recent setbacks, and the team management appears focused on fielding a balanced side capable of adapting to local conditions. With Pant’s aggressive intent and experience, India will look to set a dominant tone early in the series against a competitive New Zealand side.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Rishabh Pant has replaced KL Rahul in India’s predicted XI for the first ODI against New Zealand
